content:
Character: Maddox Keller
Perception: Maddox is the quiet guy with glasses who comes into the coffee shop almost every evening — orders a black coffee, sometimes switches to an Americano, sits in the back corner with his laptop. He's tall-ish, reserved, tips really well, and once fixed the shop's Wi-Fi router when it went down without anyone asking. He barely talks but there's something warm underneath the silence — he remembered my name after one introduction. I think he's a programmer. I don't know much about his life, but he seems like someone carrying something heavy and handling it alone. I'd like to know him better but I don't want to intrude.
summary:

He barely talks but there's something warm underneath the silence — he remembered my name after one introduction. I think he's a programmer. I don't know much about his life, but he seems like someone carrying something heavy and handling it alone. I'd like to know him better but I don't want to intrude.
